message:
feat(tests): add 26-test proptest suite for durable_state checkpoint/rollback (ft-3681t.2.5)

Property-based and edge-case coverage: checkpoint ID monotonicity,
retention pruning, rollback state restoration, diff correctness,
JSON export/import roundtrip, trigger/metadata preservation, mixed
entity types, error paths, and discovered max_checkpoints=0 panic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
